reasoning: The order is marked Complete and shows the item as shipped and paid in full, but there is no visible shipment or carrier tracking detail on this page to confirm delivery (e.g., carrier, tracking number, delivery confirmation or signature). Since the customer claims the tracking shows delivered but the package was not received, this requires further investigation with the shipping carrier and internal shipment records before issuing a refund. Escalation is appropriate to verify delivery confirmation, check for misdelivery or theft, and determine eligibility for refund or replacement.
